caption: 盘点夜，灯还亮着。
scene: Andy in good work shoes standing inside the boutique holding a small barcode scanner pointed at a single luxury bag on a low shelf, a tiny clock on the wall showing 11:50, one droopy eyelid line and the headset line still on his ear
bible_hook: §2 inventory count night = staying till midnight scanning tags under fluorescent lights
rationale: Anchors to Andy's late-night store-manager inventory grind — a work-pressure beat not yet shown; differs from recent domestic and the upbeat TARGET HIT win by leaning into tired after-hours labor.
